channel.title: Home on Noly Higashide
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Noly Higashide

item.title: Profile
item.description:
Noriyuki (Noly) Higashide

I study how scientific knowledge becomes innovation and societal impact. My work combines Science of Science, computational social science, network science, bibliometrics, and AI-assisted large-scale literature analysis to map hidden connections between science, startups, and technology development.

Current Roles

  • Impact Fellow, Northwestern Innovation Institute
  • Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Northwestern University - Kellogg School of Management
  • Founder CEO, fukan

Research Interests

  • Science of Science
  • AI in Science
  • Computational Social Science
  • Network Science
  • Bibliometrics
  • Innovation Studies
  • Knowledge Translation
  • Startup Ecosystem
  • Research Policy

Education

  • Ph.D. in Technology Management for Innovation, The University of Tokyo
  • M.Sc. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, The University of Tokyo
  • B.Eng. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Chiba University
  • A.Eng. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Hakodate National College of Technology

Links

  • Google Scholar
  • LinkedIn
  • GitHub
  • X / Twitter

item.title: 初めての投稿
item.description:
ようこそ！

これはPaperModテーマを使用したサンプル投稿です。

特徴

  • シンプルで美しいデザイン
  • ダークモード対応
  • レスポンシブデザイン
  • 高速な表示速度

コードブロックのサンプル

def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")

hello_world()

まとめ

PaperModテーマを使って、快適にブログを書くことができます。
